items.title: Wimbledon 2026 quarter-finals: Auger-Aliassime v Djokovic goes to deciding set – live
items.summary: Quarter-final action, under way in SW19 from 1pm (BST) Wildcard Fery extends Wimbledon fairytale | Mail Tanya Now a love hold for Struff, who’s started pretty well and leads 3-2...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark declines to address Brendan Sorsby gambling saga and describes league as '16 strong’
items.summary: That would include Texas Tech, which the league and its other 15 members potentially were discussing punishing if Sorsby indeed had played this fall for the Red Raiders.

items.title: Superb Holland takes Somerset to win over Essex
items.summary: Niamh Holland hits an unbeaten 92 as Somerset beat Essex by two wickets in the Women's T20 Blast.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
